title: FRQ
description: A free response question with type-specific structure and rubric criteria for AI grading

source.description: Whether from official College Board released exam or AI-generated

title.description: Descriptive title, e.g. Rate of Change & Accumulation

frq_type.description: Determines the frontend layout. multi_part_math: math input + KaTeX (Calc/Precalc/Chem). multi_part_text: text input per part. dbq: split-screen docs + essay. saq: short answer boxes. leq/essay/argument_essay: single continuous essay. concept_application/scotus_comparison/quantitative_analysis: Gov-specific multi-part text. comparative_analysis: AP Comp Gov-specific FRQ-3 — student compares two course countries on a given political concept; renders as multi-part text.

calculator_allowed.description: Whether calculator is permitted (math subjects only)

total_points.description: Maximum points for the entire FRQ

stimulus.description: Introductory text, scenario, or data table (KaTeX via $...$). Null if no stimulus.

stimulus_image.description: Path to stimulus image extracted from PDF, e.g. /data/ap-calculus-ab/frq/stimuli/calc-ab-2024-frq-1.png

source_pdf.description: Public path to the original College Board exam PDF, e.g. /pdfs/frq/ap-calculus-ab/calc-ab-2024-frq.pdf. Null for generated FRQs.

source_scoring_guideline_pdf.description: Public path to the original College Board scoring guideline PDF, e.g. /pdfs/frq/ap-calculus-ab/calc-ab-2024-sg.pdf. Null for generated FRQs.

set.description: Set number for subjects with multiple form sets (Psych/World/Gov). Null for single-set or pre-set years.

documents.description: DBQ documents array. Only present when frq_type is 'dbq'.

image.description: Path to document image (for maps, political cartoons, etc.)

letter.description: Part label: a, b, c, d, etc.

rubric_criteria.description: One string per point — includes the correct answer/approach, e.g. '1 pt: Correct integrand: int(0,3) 2t*sin(t^2) dt'

scoring_points.description: Structured per-point rubric for strict grading. Each element is one earnable point with required elements, alternatives, and wrong examples.

point_id.description: Unique ID within the FRQ, e.g. 'a1', 'b2'

required_elements.description: ALL must be present in the student response to earn the point via this alternative

correct_example.description: Example of a response that earns via this alternative

alternatives.description: Any ONE alternative being fully satisfied earns the point

wrong_examples.description: Responses that do NOT earn the point

common_traps.description: Optional: common misconceptions to watch for

scoring_notes.description: Qualitative guidance from scoring guidelines — what to accept/reject, alternate valid methods, common errors. Anti-hallucination anchor.

requires_drawing.description: True if this part requires sketching/drawing (slope fields, graphs, shading). Renders a canvas instead of text input.

reference_image.description: Path to the correct answer image for drawing parts, e.g. /data/ap-calculus-ab/frq/stimuli/calc-ab-2024-frq-5a-answer.png
